commit_scope: Normalize the workspace vitality native front-door route from the exact coherence-network path to the FastAPI template path observed by API-source route-goal telemetry.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk
python3 scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py /goal --source api --seconds 86400 --limit 2000 --json | python3 -c '<extract vitality route status>'
local_validation.notes: Focused source-language route-class band returned 8389697 with 1 ok and 0 divergent. This focused band is 3-kernel only; no all-kernel claim is made for this route slice. The API-source route-goal write now reports GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/vitality as kernel-native-high-grammar with current_grammar BML, current_source deploy/front-door/api.bml, current_handler api_workspace_vitality, and high_grammar_native true. The focused Go carrier route-selection test passed. A broader cd form/form-kernel-go && go test ./... attempt failed in pre-existing TestHealthRouteNativeOperationalShape because this workstation reports smart_reap_available:true while the test expects false; this route slice did not change health behavior.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending after PR merge and public deploy checks.

phase_gate.notes: Local focused proof is complete; CI and deploy validation are pending.

evidence_refs: native_route_goal_loop.py /goal --source api: vitality route status=kernel-native-high-grammar, current_handler=api_workspace_vitality

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/vitality is recognized as a BML high-grammar native route and returns the request-derived workspace_id through the existing vitality JSON projection.
test_flows: API-source route-goal telemetry counts GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/vitality as high_grammar_native.
Go kernel route selection loads deploy/front-door/api.bml and selects native read routes.
